title: Buffalo Bill and the Indians, or Sitting Bull's History Lesson
original_title: Buffalo Bill and the Indians, or Sitting Bull's History Lesson
overview: Buffalo Bill plans to put on his own Wild West sideshow, and Chief Sitting Bull has agreed to appear in it. However, Sitting Bull has his own hidden agenda, involving the President and General Custer.
